cluster_id.description: VergeOS cluster ID where VMs are created

vnet_id.description: VergeOS VNET ID attached to the VM

image_file_id.description: Optional existing VergeOS Files ID. Use 0 or leave unset to import and cache the required image automatically from Talos Image Factory.

preferred_tier.description: Optional VergeOS storage tier, normally 1 through 5

cpu_type.description: Optional CPU model; leave empty to use the VergeOS default

machine_type.description: Optional QEMU machine type; leave empty for the VergeOS default

guest_agent.description: Enable the QEMU Guest Agent device in VergeOS. Install the siderolabs/qemu-guest-agent extension in Omni when enabling this option.
